title: You_ little guy_ took us on quite the journey

script.text: 1일 아침 6시 조정현의 굿모닝 팝 해봐요 조정현의 굿모닝 팝
4월에 함께하는 영화는 A Grand Adventure to Uncover Underwater Legends
katek the brave beluga 용감한 돌고리 벨루와 바다 속 친구들
여섯 살 아이랑 같이 영어 공부하고 싶은데
제가 영어만 쓰면 자기가 못 알아 듣는다고 하지 말래요.
Well, that's the same situation in my house.
I even send messages to my daughter in Korean
and she responds with 음성 녹음
So I'm in the same situation actually
Well, then I write it in Korean and English
She has a little watch that she can use to record messages
그래서 이게 영어는 스트레스를 받는 게 아니야
Of course, not everybody is a talented singer
So you're going to have to work really hard
Also, try to find what you're saying
or what you want to say
And then you can try to correct
Daddy, I thought you're good at English
Daddy's got a lot to learn
아, 요즘 지금 효과를 보고 계시다는
I think that's the most important
They love to live in groups
네, 그러면 실제로도 이게 옳은 이야기죠
So other families or groups of whales
They like to travel together during migration
And sometimes they can form groups of thousands
Even if it's not their own baby
Sometimes they raise another whale's baby
as if it was their own
바로 제가 그 말하면 푸마씨 생각날 줄이게요
그래서 joke is not a joke
This chemistry is not a joke
took us on quite the journey
We need to make a little less noise
Took us on quite the journey
Took us on quite the journey
Managed to get away from him
I barely managed to get away from that big scary killer whale
긴장감 넘치던 그 장면이 생각이 납니다
그럼 한 번 더 확인해 볼게요
took us on quite the journey
We need to make a little less noise
took us on quite the journey
took us on quite a journey
넌 도대체 무슨 생각을 한 거야?
We need to make a little less noise
We need to make a little less noise
Just think how long I've known you
내가 당신을 안 지 얼마나 되었는지 생각해봐요
It's wrong for me to own you
나는 그저 젊은 날의 환상일 뿐이에요
